reconstruction_contract: adequate for drafting context only, not exact source reconstruction
residual_coding: missing exact quotes are not reconstructed
fallback_trigger: route to full source notes for exact source wording, citations, proof input, benchmark input, or audit
decode_determinism: not an executable decoder; fixture records a draft contract only
consumer_policy: Preview consumers may use this record for orientation only; exact replay, citation, proof, audit, benchmark, or training consumers must use the full artifact or stronger receipt.
